This dashboard merges your 2024, 2025 and 2026 Excel tracking files. These remain the official source of truth — update them and regenerate this page to keep it current.

↗ Excel 2026 ↗ PDF Timeline

Status legend

  • Red · This month — immediate action required
  • Amber · 3 months — plan ahead
  • Grey · Expired — rights lapsed, remove from circulation
  • Green · Perpetual — no usage limit
  • White · Active — expires beyond 3 months

About the data

333 unique projects extracted from Creative Pros, Creators, Business Pros, CLC, Photo Hobbyists and Marketing Pros tabs across all three files. 333 thumbnails loaded directly from the source Excel files. 0 entries without thumbnail
